---
title: "Stray Pearls: Memoirs of Margaret de Ribaumont, Viscountess of Bellaise. 2 vols"
---

## Stray Pearls: Memoirs of Margaret de Ribaumont, Viscountess of Bellaise. 2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

This is a sequel to <i>The Chaplet of Pearls.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
